sections.title: Cocktails
sections.subtitle: Craft mixology rooted in the French Quarter tradition. Each glass tells a Louisiana story.

categories.label: Signature Cocktails
categories.description: Chef-curated craft cocktails celebrating the complexity of New Orleans spirits culture.

items.name: Superbird Paloma
items.description: Superbird canned tequila paloma — blanco tequila, pink grapefruit, lime, a crisp effervescent pour straight from the can.
items.imageAlt: Superbird Tequila Paloma — Louisiana Purchase signature cocktail

items.name: Watermelon Margarita
items.description: Blanco tequila, fresh watermelon, lime, agave, finished with a watermelon wedge.
items.imageAlt: Watermelon Margarita — Louisiana Purchase craft cocktail

items.name: Gin & Juice
items.description: Butterfly pea flower gin over fresh citrus juice — a color-shifting pour that fades from violet to gold.
items.imageAlt: Gin & Juice — Louisiana Purchase craft cocktail

items.name: Hurricane Pop
items.description: Dark and spiced rum, passion fruit, orange, grenadine — the classic Hurricane finished with a crackling Pop Rocks garnish.
items.imageAlt: Hurricane Pop — Louisiana Purchase signature cocktail with Pop Rocks garnish

sections.title: Kitchen
sections.subtitle: Chef Quinnton Austin's elevated Creole culinary program — fire-forward, deeply rooted, and utterly precise.

categories.label: Raw & Fire
categories.description: Oysters and charred preparations from the open kitchen.

items.name: Fire-Charred Oysters
items.description: Pacific oysters on the half shell, charred over live fire, house compound butter, parsley gremolata, toasted breadcrumb. Half dozen or full dozen.
items.imageAlt: Fire-charred oysters — Louisiana Purchase raw bar

items.name: Gulf Oysters on the Half Shell
items.description: Freshly shucked Gulf oysters, Creole mignonette, house hot sauce, fresh horseradish. Market selection rotates daily.
items.imageAlt: Gulf oysters on the half shell at Louisiana Purchase

items.name: Fried Oysters & Fries
items.description: Crispy fried Gulf oysters, seasoned fries, house remoulade.
items.imageAlt: Fried oysters and fries — Louisiana Purchase kitchen

items.name: ACME Oysters
items.description: 7 chargrilled Gulf oysters, garlic lemon butter, parmesan.
items.imageAlt: ACME Oysters — chargrilled Gulf oysters with garlic lemon butter and parmesan at Louisiana Purchase

categories.label: Plates
categories.description: Elevated Creole plates built for sharing and lingering.

items.name: Louisiana BBQ Shrimp
items.description: Head-on Gulf shrimp, Worcestershire butter sauce, cracked black pepper, rosemary, toasted French bread. A NOLA institution, rendered with obsessive care.
items.imageAlt: Louisiana BBQ Shrimp at Louisiana Purchase

items.name: Chicken & Andouille Gumbo
items.description: Dark roux gumbo, free-range chicken, smoked andouille, okra, holy trinity, steamed white rice. Slow-built over three hours.
items.imageAlt: Chicken and andouille gumbo — Louisiana Purchase kitchen

items.name: Steak Étouffée
items.description: Fire-seared ribeye, crawfish étouffée, roasted garlic.
items.imageAlt: Steak étouffée — Louisiana Purchase signature dish

items.name: Lobster Pasta
items.description: Half-shell lobster, Creole cream sauce, toasted breadcrumb.
items.imageAlt: Lobster pasta — Louisiana Purchase Creole kitchen

items.name: Dooky Chase
items.description: 4 whole fried chicken wings, biscuit, 1 side. In honor of Mrs. Leah Chase.
items.imageAlt: Dooky Chase — fried chicken wings, biscuit, and a side at Louisiana Purchase, in honor of Mrs. Leah Chase

sections.title: Brunch
sections.subtitle: Weekend Creole brunch plates — Saturday and Sunday from noon.

categories.label: Brunch Plates
categories.description: Chef Quinnton Austin's weekend brunch program.

items.name: Drop Top Chicken Flock
items.description: Waffle topped with fried wings, honey butter, maple syrup n' fresh fruit.
items.imageAlt: Drop Top Chicken Flock — fried chicken and waffle brunch dish at Louisiana Purchase

items.name: Catfish N' Grits
items.description: Fried catfish, creole sauce, smoked gouda grits, bacon n' green onion.
items.imageAlt: Catfish N' Grits — brunch dish at Louisiana Purchase North Park

items.name: Shrimp N' Grits
items.description: Fried shrimp, creole sauce, smoked gouda grits, bacon n' green onion.
items.imageAlt: Shrimp N' Grits — brunch dish at Louisiana Purchase North Park
